title: NanoAmpli-Seq - Bioinformatics Workflow
author: Szymon T STC Calus
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.u25eyg6

steps.title: # Program requires input data (-i),...
steps.instruction: # Program requires input data (-i), version of the flow cell (-f),# version of the sequencing kit (-k), output file (-o), # amount of cores used for analysis (-t) and saving directory (-s)./home/opt/.pyenv/versions/3.5.0/bin/full_1dsq_basecaller.py -i data/ -f FLO-MIN107 -k SQK-LSK308 -o fasta -t 20 -s . Raw data (HDF5) generated with MinKNOW has to be basecalled with Albacore v2.3.3 (or newer) software. The output of the basecalling should be in FASTA format. Further analysis requires 1D2 data only so, full_1dsq_basecaller.py algorithm must be used.

steps.title: Correction of the data with INC-Seq...
steps.instruction: Correction of the data with INC-Seq algorithm uses only 1D2 data and is divided into two main steps:

steps.title: Identification of segments made of 16S rRNA genes
steps.instruction: Identification of segments made of 16S rRNA genes.

steps.title: Anchor alignment of concatamerised amplicons and consensus calling with PBDAGCon
steps.instruction: Anchor alignment of concatamerised amplicons and consensus calling with PBDAGCon.Corrected reads have got ~98% accuracy and can be directly used as an input for chopSEQ software. Linux

steps.title: Identification of forward and reverse primers (e
steps.instruction: Identification of forward and reverse primers (e.g. 8F and 1387R) with pairwise2 aligner.

steps.title: Re-orientation of incorrectly concatamerised reads and...
steps.instruction: Re-orientation of incorrectly concatamerised reads and removal of tandem repeats recognised with use of etandem (EMBOSS) and subsequent merging of reads.

steps.title: Size filtration with Biopython
steps.instruction: Size filtration with Biopython.Now reads are qualified for nanoClust OTU binning and consensus calling. Linux

steps.title: Reads from each partition are grouped...
steps.instruction: Reads from each partition are grouped according to 97% similarity with VSEARCH.

steps.title: VSEARCH partition dereplication, singleton removal and...
steps.instruction: VSEARCH partition dereplication, singleton removal and binning are performed on split data.

steps.title: Optimal read sections are used for clustering
steps.instruction: Optimal read sections are used for clustering.

steps.title: MAFFT G-INS-i is used for within...
steps.instruction: MAFFT G-INS-i is used for within OTU alignment and consensus calling of data.

steps.title: Albacore v2
steps.instruction: Albacore v2.3.3 Linux https://community.nanoporetech.com/downloads Oxford Nanopore Tech. INC-Seq Linux https://github.com/CSB5/INC-Seq Genome Institute of Singapore chopSeq v0.3 Linux https://github.com/umerijaz/nanopore University of Glasgow nanoCLUST v0.4 Linux https://github.com/umerijaz/nanopore University of Glasgow
